tagged_types.name: Block_Processing
Frequency_Domain
tagged_types.code: type Frequency_Domain (Window_Size : Positive) is tagged private;

tagged_types.name: Magnitudes
tagged_types.code:
type Magnitudes (Half_Window_Size : Positive) is tagged private
  with Constant_Indexing  => Mag;

subprograms.name: Bin_Center_Frequency

documentation.description:
Return the center frequency of a given Bin (based on sample rate and
window size).

subprograms.name: Bin_Magnitudes
subprograms.code:
procedure Bin_Magnitudes (FD   :     Frequency_Domain;
                          Mags : out Magnitudes'Class)

documentation.description: Compute all the magnitudes of bins in the frequency domain

subprograms.name: Img
subprograms.code: function Img (This : Frequency_Domain; Bin : Natural) return S16

documentation.description: Return the Imaginary component of the FFT Bin

subprograms.name: Mag
subprograms.code: function Mag (This : Magnitudes; Bin : Natural) return S16

documentation.description: Return the Magnitude of the FFT Bin
Return the index of the bin with highest magnitude

subprograms.name: Process_FFT

documentation.description: Compute the FFT and store results in the Frequency_Domain object

subprograms.name: Push_Frame

documentation.description:
Push an audio frame for analysis and return true if a new FFT can be
computed. (The FFT can computed every Hop_Size frame).

subprograms.name: Push_Frame
subprograms.code:
procedure Push_Frame (This    : in out Block_Processing;
                      Frame   :        S16)

documentation.description: Push an audio frame for analysis

subprograms.name: Rel
subprograms.code: function Rel (This : Frequency_Domain; Bin : Natural) return S16

documentation.description: Return the Real component of the FFT Bin
